programs.programName: HOPE Waiver (Home & Community-Based Options and Person Centered Excellence)

verified.notes: Income limits exist but are expressed as multiples of Federal Benefit Rate (FBR) which fluctuates annually; 2026 FBR-based income limit not found in search results. Asset limits are current as of 2026 per medicaidlongtermcare.org. Waiver expiration is 09/30/2026 with anticipated renewal effective 10/01/2026 per dhs.sd.gov. Program is not an entitlement; enrollment capped at approximately 3,103 beneficiaries per year with potential waitlist.

programs.programName: Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE)

verified.notes: PACE is not currently operating in South Dakota as of April 2026. Search results indicate South Dakota is among states without PACE/LIFE programs. A feasibility study was conducted (HB 1016, 2024) to evaluate potential statewide implementation, but no operational program exists. Age requirement (55+) is the national PACE standard per federal program design, not South Dakota-specific. Income and asset limits, phone numbers, and other eligibility details cannot be provided because the program does not operate in this state. User should verify current status with South Dakota Department of Human Services or consult the National PACE Association locator at https://www.npaonline.org/find-a-pace-program.

verified.notes: Income limits reflect 2026 FPL-based thresholds (135% FPL for South Dakota MSPs). QMB program selected as primary pathway for seniors; asset limits are federal standards applied in South Dakota. Phone number is South Dakota DSS Medicare Savings Program line. No age restriction applies to these programs—eligibility is based on Medicare enrollment, income, and assets only.

verified.notes: Income limits based on 200% of federal poverty level per South Dakota Department of Social Services. Monthly figures calculated from household income thresholds shown in official state source (7-person household at $22,514 annual = ~$1,876/month, indicating ~$17,514 annual for 1-person at 200% FPL = $1,459/month; 2-person at ~$23,514 annual = $1,959/month). Phone number is for GROW South Dakota, primary weatherization provider for multiple counties. Program has no age requirement but prioritizes elderly and individuals with disabilities. No asset limits found in official sources.
